creator: thefloridaqueenie
caption:
I don’t say this lightly… this is the BEST burger I’ve ever had 🍔🔥

If you’re in Tampa and you haven’t been to Doc B’s, fix that immediately.
Their entire menu is fabulous but the burger was my favorite!

It’s casual but elevated, great for lunch, dinner, or when you’re craving something that’s actually worth the calories. 😉

📍 Address: 2223 N Westshore Blvd, Tampa, FL 33607

pinned_places: Address: 2223 N Westshore Blvd, Tampa, FL 33607

transcription.text: This is the best burger I've had in Tampa. Welcome to Doc B's, located at International Plaza and Bay Street in Tampa, Florida. The burger was incredible, but so was everything else we tried here, including the cocktails and mocktails. We started off with their guac and sweet potato chips and the brussel sprout salad. Both were so fresh and delicious. Then we tried the wedge burger, which was the best burger I've ever had, and that is no exaggeration. The Danish barbecue ribs were perfectly cooked and so delicious, and they even give you hot towels to wipe your hands off with afterwards. The chicken kebabs and number one tuna salad were also incredible if you're looking for a healthier option. If you haven't tried Doc B's yet, you are missing out. They're located right next door to Rocco's Tacos. Send this to a friend you would want to go here with.
